title: Samsung unveils new Galaxy Z8 foldables and Galaxy Watches, available August 7
summary: The Ultra 2 is, naturally, Samsung’s updated take on the Apple Watch Ultra. This watch is aluminum, featuring the squircle case design Samsung first debuted on the first Ultra watch.
